title: Middle Eastern Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy to make dish with marinated chicken, perfect for a quick dinner or lunch. The combination of spices and herbs gives it a distinct Middle Eastern taste.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together piquant sauce, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and mix well to coat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
